title: Botaniverse
body: Have You ever dreamt about better mana pools, spreaders or sparks for your beloved Botania? Well, dream no more, meet new extremely flexible and configurable addon: Botaniverse! ![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Unsupported-5ebfa2?style=for-the-badge&logoColor=4d57de&label=Status&color=c22241) **Depends on HammerLib**: Currently this mod adds 4 types of Mana Pools, and 4 types of Sparks. Each subsequent Spark or Pool drastically surpasses the previous one. Pools: - **Nilfheim Mana Pool**. Stores 10 times the default Mana Pool. - **Muspelheim Mana Pool**. Stores 100 times the default Mana Pool. - **Alfheim Mana Pool**. Stores 1000 times the default Mana Pool. - **Asgard Mana Pool**. Stores 2000 times the default Mana Pool. Config also allows you to set a value for pools transfer rate IN and OUT of items. Example is when you throw a tablet into the pool trying to discharge or charge it. Now this can be adjusted and will give a user more freedom. Spreades: - **Nilfheim Mana spreader**. Carries 2400 Mana per burst - **Muspelheim Mana spreader**. Carries 9600 Mana per burst - **Alfheim Mana spreader**. Carries 38400 Mana per burst - **Asgard Mana spreader**. Carries 153600 Mana per burst Also adds a Creative Mana spreader capable of carrying 107374182 Mana per burst Sparks: - **Nilfheim Spark**. Has a Range of 18 and capable of transferring up to 100000 Mana/t. - **Muspelheim Spark**. Has a Range of 24 and capable of transferring up to 250000Mana/t. - **Alfheim Spark**. Has a Range of 30 and capable of transferring up to 625000Mana/t. - **Asgard Spark**. Has a Range of 36 and capable of transferring up to 1562500Mana/t. Runes: - **Nilfheim Rune** - **Muspelheim Rune** - **Alfheim Rune** - **Asgard Rune** For modpack's devs. You can configure various parameters according to your needs and balance in your modpack, if the values by default seem to be too OP. **Beta version!:** Here be dragons! Credits: Special thanks to @PrySHio for design and textures Permissions: 1.You are allowed to redistribute this mod, but you must credit the download source as 'CurseForge' or 'Modrinth' and include a direct link that leads to the page of this mod 2.You can use this mod in your modpacks 3.You are allowed to modify the source code of the mod
